hero.headline: Your Home Journey Starts Here
hero.subheadline: First-Time Buyers · Luxury Properties · Relocation · Investment · New Builds

about.title: Tucson's Trusted REALTOR®
about.body: Nina Flores is a REALTOR® with OMNI Homes International who has a mission to help as many people as she can buy, sell and invest in Tucson real estate and has a particular passion helping renters escape the rent trap and own their home!

specialties.title: How Nina Can Help You
specialties.subtitle: Whether you're buying your first home or expanding your investment portfolio, Nina has the expertise to guide you.

firstTimeBuyers.title: First-Time Buyers
firstTimeBuyers.desc: Navigating your first home purchase can feel overwhelming. Nina walks you through every step — from pre-qualification to closing day.

luxury.title: Luxury Properties
luxury.desc: Tucson's luxury market demands discretion and market knowledge. Nina specializes in high-end properties across the metro's finest communities.

relocation.title: Relocation
relocation.desc: Moving to Tucson from out of town? Nina helps relocating families find the right neighborhood, schools, and home to fit their lifestyle.

investment.title: Investment Properties
investment.desc: From single-family rentals to multi-family opportunities, Nina identifies properties with strong ROI potential in the Tucson market.

newBuilds.title: New Home Builds
newBuilds.desc: Work with Nina to navigate new construction communities across Tucson, Marana, Vail, and Sahuarita — with an expert advocate on your side.

renters.title: Renters
renters.desc: Still renting? Nina helps renters make the leap to homeownership — even when it feels out of reach. You may be closer than you think.

listings.title: Featured Listings
listings.subtitle: A handpicked selection of properties currently available in the Tucson area.

neighborhoods.title: Tucson Area Neighborhoods
neighborhoods.subtitle: Nina serves buyers and sellers across the greater Tucson metro. Explore the communities she knows best.

calculator.title: Mortgage Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Estimate your monthly payment before you start your search.
calculator.disclaimer: This is an estimate only. Contact a lender for accurate figures.
calculator.prequalNote: Nina works with buyers who are pre-qualified or paying cash. Talk to a lender today.

prequal.title: Get Pre-Qualified
prequal.subtitle: Fill out your information and a mortgage professional will reach out to discuss your options.
